who: CFOs of accounting firms processing 10-50 financial reports/month
offer: For CFOs of accounting firms processing 10-50 financial reports/month, manual report generation causes delays in client deliverables. We automate report creation instead of spreadsheets and manual reporting tools.
problem: Manual report generation is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for CFOs seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar reporting challenges
DM outreach to CFOs with demo video links
Engage in forums where CFOs share tools and tips
try_it: Let users try customizable report templates and user-friendly dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
